strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.disableAlertMessage:
Daminta digniinaha PHI waxay ka saareysaa dhammaan fariimaha amniga marka la wadaago xogta bukanka hab aan ammaan ahayn.

Kaliya dami haddii siyaasadda hay'addaadu si cad u ogolaato dirista PHI oo aan sir ahayn.

Adiga iyo hay'addaadu waxaad qaadanaysaan mas'uuliyadda buuxda xog kasta oo aan la ilaalin.
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiDisabledBannerBody: Fariimaha amniga Xogta Caafimaadka ee La Ilaaliyay (PHI) way DAMISAN YIHIIN. Dhammaan xogta lagu diro qaabab aan AirDrop ahayn waxay sii socon doontaa iyada oo aan wax digniin PHI ah la muujin.
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiDisabledLiabilityBo: Daminta digniinaha PHI, adiga iyo hay'addaadu waxaad aqbashaan mas'uuliyadda buuxda xog kasta oo bukaan oo aan sir ahayn la diro. MedicLog ma soo jeedin doono ka hor inta aan PHI lagu dirin qaabab aan ammaan ahayn. Go'aankan waa kaaga — hubi in siyaasadda hay'addaadu si cad u ogolaato.
strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiDisabledLiabilityTi: WAXAAD QAADANAYSAA DHAMMAAN KHATARTA IYO MAS'UULIYADDA

strings.ios.aiParsing.apiKeyStorageNote: Furuhaaga API waxaa si ammaan ah loogu kaydiyaa iOS Keychain marnabana kama baxo qalabkaaga marka laga reebo marka la sameeyo wicitaannada API ee Anthropic.
strings.ios.aiParsing.baaAcknowledgmentToggleLab: Waan fahamsanahay mas'uuliyadaha hay'addaydu ka saaran yihiin waafaqsanaanta HIPAA ee astaamahan.
strings.ios.aiParsing.costBody: Waxaad si toos ah ugu bixisaa Anthropic — qiyaastii $0.001–0.003 sawir kasta. Wareeg caadi ah oo isticmaala 10–20 sawir waxay ku kacaysaa wax ka yar $0.06. MedicLog waxba kama qaado.

strings.ios.aiParsing.fallbackNote: Si toos ah ugu noqdaa OCR-ka qalabka marka la khatoo ama API-gu aanu diyaar ahayn.
strings.ios.aiParsing.hipaaCheckWithAdminNote: Haddii aadan hubin in hay'addaadu haysato BAA, la xiriir maamulaha hay'addaada ama sarkaalka waafaqsanaanta ka hor intaad shiddo astaamahan.
strings.ios.aiParsing.hipaaComplianceBody: Isticmaalka astaamahan xogta bukanka waxay kaa baahan tahay adiga ama hay'addaadu inaad saxeexdaan Heshiiska Shaqaalaha Ganacsiga (BAA) ee Anthropic. Furayaasha API ee shakhsiyeed ee laga helo console.anthropic.com caadi ahaan kuma jirto BAA.
strings.ios.aiParsing.howItWorksBody: Astaamahan waxay isticmaashaa Claude, AI-ga Anthropic, si ay u falanqeyso sawirada shaashadaha monitarka iyo liistada dawada si ay xog ka soo saarto mid ka sax badan habaynta qalabka. Sawirada waxaa loo gudbiyaa API-ga Anthropic iyadoo loo marayo HTTPS oo sir ah, la falanqeeyo, si toos ahna ay Anthropic u tirtirto. In nuqul gudaha ah loo kaydiyo diiwaanka kulanku waxay ku xidhan tahay Dejinta Kulanka oo gaar ah.
strings.ios.aiParsing.includeDoseFreqFooterOff: Kaliya magacyada dawada ayaa laga soo saari doonaa sawirada (waxaa lagu talinayaa EMS).
strings.ios.aiParsing.includeDoseFreqFooterOn: Magacyada dawada, qiyaasta, iyo inta jeer ayaa laga soo saari doonaa sawirada.
strings.ios.aiParsing.removeKeyAlertMessage: Tani waxay ka saari doontaa furaha API-ga la kaydiyay waxayna dami doontaa Claude Vision OCR.

strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.costEstimateBody: Sawir kasta oo monitarka ah wuxuu ku kacayaa qiyaastii $0.001–0.003 habaynta. Wareeg caadi ah oo isticmaala 10–20 sawir wuxuu ku kacayaa wax ka yar $0.06. Anthropic ayaa si toos ah kuugu soo dalacsiinaysa — MedicLog waxba kama qaado.
strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.hipaaBody: Haddii aad isticmaalayso astaamahan xogta bukanka goob caafimaad, hay'addaadu waa inay haysataa Heshiiska Shaqaalaha Ganacsiga (BAA) oo la saxeexay Anthropic. Akoonnadda API caadiga ah kuma jirto BAA. La xiriir kooxda ganacsi ee Anthropic ama sarkaalka waafaqsanaanta hay'addaada si aad hagid u hesho.
strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.whyByokBody: Bring Your Own Key macnaheedu waa inaad si toos ah ugu bixiso Anthropic. Dhexdhexaadiye la'aan, qiimo dheeraad ah la'aan, rubuc la'aan. Adigu waxaad xakameysaa isticmaalka API-gaaga iyo kharashka.

MedicLog wuxuu si toos ah u ogaan karaa tirada orodka fariimaha dirista.

Tani waxay u shaqeysaa laba hab:
• Nuqul & dhaji — nuqul fariinta dirista, fur MedicLog, tirada orodku way buuxsataa
• Mashiinka Shortcuts — tirada orodku si toos ah ayay u muuqataa asalka
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pasteMessageInstructio:
U gudub abkaaga Fariimaha, Iimaylka, ama CAD oo nuqul fariinta oo ay ku jirto tirada orodka.

Ka dib soo noqo halkan oo taabo Sii wad.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionExplana:
iOS waxay weydiin doontaa "Ogolaan Dhajinta?" mar kasta oo MedicLog akhriyo fariinta dirista ee la nuqulay.

Sii ogolaanshaha hal mar Dejinta mana weydiin doonto mar kale.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionWorkflo: Nuqul dirista → fur MedicLog → tirada orodku si toos ah u buuxsamaysaa, soo-bixin la'aan.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.radioDispatchHint: Dirista raadiyaha, CAD, ama ilo kale oo aan qoraal ahayn — isticmaal "ku qor tusaale."
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.savedMessage:
MedicLog hadda wuu aqoonsan doonaa tirada orodka sida %@ markaad nuqul ka sameyso fariinta dirista oo aad furto abka.

Mashiinka Shortcuts, fariimaha dirista waxaa sidoo kale si toos ah loo ogaan karaa asalka — nuqul la'aan.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.shortcutsOfferMessage:
iOS Shortcuts ayaa si toos ah u ogaan kara fariimaha dirista una diri kara tirada orodka MedicLog — nuqul la'aan.

Tani waxay u baahan tahay habeyn hal-mar ah abka Shortcuts.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.shortcutsRequirementNo: Wuxuu u baahan yahay iOS 16 ama ka sareeya. Ku tijaabi qof kuugu dira fariinta qaabka diristooda.

strings.ios.exportOptionsView.phiWarningBody2: Mas'uuliyadda ayaa kaa saaran in faylasha la dhoofiyay si ammaan ah loo diro oo kaliya loogu diro qaabilayaal la oggol yahay waafaqsanaanta HIPAA.
strings.ios.exportOptionsView.photoWarningAlertM:
Sawirada waxay ka kooban karaan Xog Caafimaad oo KHATARTA SARE ah oo ay ku jiraan wejiyaha bukanka, dhaawacyada muuqda, qalabka caafimaadka, iyo baakadda dawada.

Mas'uuliyadda ayaa kaa saaran in sawirada la dhoofiyay si ammaan ah loo diro oo kaliya loogu diro qaabilayaal la oggol yahay waafaqsanaanta HIPAA.

strings.ios.helpLibraryView.airDropDetail: Si toos ah ula wadaag diiwaannada wacitaanka qalabka Apple ee u dhow. Wareejinta deg-deg ah oo ammaan ah.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.autoDetectionDetail: Markaad dhajiso ama ku qorto qoraalka dirista, MedicLog wuxuu si toos ah u soo saaraa tirada orodka iyo xogta bukanka.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.bedsideTransferDetai: Samee QR code oo ay kooxda qaabilaha sawirto. Wareejin xogta bukanka si ammaan ah daqiiqado gudahooda.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.cardiacDetail: Gelitaan degdeg ah CPR, defibrillation, cardioversion. Taabo ama codka ku diiwaan geli waxqabadyada wadnaha.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.copyReportDetail: Taabo Nuqul si aad warbixinta MIST ugu dhajiso clipboard-kaaga. Ku dhaji qoraalada raadiyaha ama ogeysiinta isbitaalka.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.countPulseRespDetail: Taabo Tiri Nabadka ama Tiri Neefsashada Calaamadaha Noolaha. Saacaddu waxay kaa caawisaa tirinta 15 ilbiriqsi waxayna si toos ah u dhufto.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.creatingTemplatesDet: Tag Dejinta > Habeynta Dirista. Ku dar qaabab u dhigma qaabka SMS ee xarunta diristooda.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.dispatchAutoFillDeta: Habee qaababka SMS Dejinta si ay si toos ah ugu buuxiyaan tirada orodka iyo xogta bukanka qoraalada dirista.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.doubleTapActionsDeta: Laba-jeer taabo saacad kasta si aad u hesho ficilada degdegga: Dib-u-qiyaas, Dib-u-dhig 1daqiiqo, Ka jooji, ama Iska dhaaf.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.editingProfilesDetai: Taabo astaanta qalinku xog kasta si aad wax uga beddesho magaca, ID-ga, lambarka gariga, ama hay'adda.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.encryptedTransferDet: Ku dhoof .mlshare fayl oo erey-sir leh. Sir AES-256 waafaqsanaanta HIPAA.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.ivioAccessDetail: Diiwaan geli katheetarrada IV iyo irbadda IO. Isticmaal sawirka jirka si aad u calaamadayso goobaha la dhigay.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.keyboardShortcutsDet: Kiiboodhka dibadda: Cmd+N qoraal cusub, Cmd+T saacadaha, Cmd+V calaamadaha noolaha.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.medicationsDetail: Taabo badhanka dawada ama isticmaal codka si aad u diiwaan geliso. Si toos ah u bilaabiso saacadaha dawada marka la habeyn.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.mistFormatDetail: Warbixin si toos ah loo sameeyay: Hab/Cabasho caafimaad, Dhaawacyo/Cudur, Calaamado/Astaamo, Daaweyn la bixiyay.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.multiProviderModeDet: Ku dar xubnaha kooxda wacitaanka. Qoraal kasta waxaa loo tiriyaa daryeel-bixiyaha sameeyay.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.notesDetail: Ku dar qoraallo xor ah. Beddel Cabasho Aasaasiga si aad u qeexdo nooca wacitaanka.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.offlineModeDetail: Watch-ku wuxuu si madax-bannaan uga shaqeeyaa marka iPhone-ku ka fogaado. Isku-duwaa marka dib loo xidho.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.pdfCsvExportDetail: Dhoof diiwaannada wacitaanka PDF ahaan nidaamyada ePCR, ama CSV xaashiyaha falanqaynta.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.perProfileSettingsDe: Xog kasta waxay yeelan kartaa badhannada gelinta degdegga, midabka saacadaha, iyo dawooyin la doorbiday oo kala duwan.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.proceduresDetail: Dukumeenti geli hab-maamuusyada sida isgaarsiinta, qalloocinta, daryeelka dhaawaca, iyo wax kale.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.qrCodesDetail: Samee QR code-yo wareejinta degdegga. Ku sawir qalab MedicLog kale si aad u soo dejiso.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.qrSharingDetail: Qalabka qaabiluhu wuxuu sawiraa QR code-gaaga. Xogta waa sir marnabana ma taabato server kasta.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.redoseDetail: Waxay diiwaan gelisaa qiyaas kale oo isla dawada ah waxayna dib u bilaabisaa saacadda.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.runNumbersDetail: Si gacanta ah geli ama ka dhaji SMS dirista. MedicLog wuxuu si toos ah u ogaadaa qaababka caadiga ah ee tirada orodka.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.sampleTemplatesDetai: Qaababku waxay taageeraan meeleyaalaha sida {RUN}, {AGE}, {SEX}, {CHIEF}. Arag tusaalooyinka Habeynta Dirista.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.shareReportDetail: Ku wadaag AirDrop, Fariimaha, ama abab kale. Waxtar u leh ogeysiinta hore ee isbitaalka.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.snoozeDetail: Waxay kordhisaa saacadda 1 daqiiqo iyada oo aan la diiwaan gelin qiyaas. Waxtar u leh marka bukanu xaalad deggan yahay.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.startingACallDetail: Taabo 'Bilow Wacitaan' shaashadda guriga. Si ikhtiyaari ah geli tirada orodka, xogta bukanka, ama dhaji qoraalka dirista.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.swipeGesturesDetail: U xariiq bidix safka taariikhda wacitaanka si aad u tirtirto. U xariiq midig xogaha doorashooyin dheeraad ah.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.switchingProfilesDet: Taabo xogtaada Dejinta si aad ugu beddeshid xogaha la kaydiyay. Waxtar u leh hay'ado ama dooroyin kala duwan.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.syncDetail: Watch-ka iyo iPhone-ku si toos ah ayay isku-duwaan. Qoraalada Watch-ka laga sameeyay waxay si toos ah uga muuqdaan iPhone-ka.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.timerColorsDetail: Habee muuqaalka saacadaha Dejinta. Midabku wuxuu ka caawiyaa kala-saarista qaybaha dawada si degdeg ah.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.transportTimesDetail: Wareejinta isbitaalku waxay ku jirtaa waqtiyada gaadiidka: dirista, imaatinka, ka bixitaanka goobta, gaadhi isbitaalka.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.vitalsDetail: Taabo Calaamadaha Noolaha si aad u furto foomka, ama ka hadal sida 'BP 120 over 80, pulse 95'.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.voiceLoggingDetail: Kor u qaad gacantaada oo ka hadal. Watch-ku wuxuu diiwaan geliyaa dawooyin, calaamadaha noolaha, iyo qoraalada iyada oo gacanta la'aan.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.voiceTipsDetail: Si dabiici ah u hadal: 'Narcan 2 milligrams nasal' ama 'BP 120 over 80'. MedicLog wuu fahmaa ereyo caafimaad.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.watchAutoLaunchDetai: Abka Watch-ka si toos ah ayuu u furmaa markaad bilaabiso wacitaan iPhone-ka. Ka habeyn karo Dejinta.
strings.ios.helpLibraryView.withheldDetail: Waxay diiwaan gelisaa in qiyaas la qorsheeyay si ula-kac ah looga joojiyay. Waxay dukumeenti gelisaa go'aanka caafimaadka.

strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section1Body:
MedicLog waa software beta oo horumar socda. In kasta oo aan hirgelino dhaqamada amniga ugu wanaagsan oo ay ku jiraan sirta, xakameynta helitaanka, iyo digniinaha PHI, software-kan waxaa loo bixiyaa ujeedooyinka qiimaynta.

ABKAN WAXAA LA BIXIYAY "SIDII UU YAHAY" DAMAANAD-QAAD LA'AAN.

Waxaan hirgelinaa:
• Sir qalabka (iOS Data Protection)
• Dir sir ah (AirDrop, kanaalada ammaan ah)
• Digniinaha PHI meelaha dhoofinta
• Kaydin gudaha kaliya (ma jirto dir daruuraha)

Si kastaba ha ahaatee, ADIGA ayaa mas'uul ka ah waafaqsanaanta HIPAA.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section2Body:
ADIGA (isticmaalaha) kaliya ayaad mas'uul ka tahay:
✓ Hubinta in isticmaalkagu waafaqsan yahay HIPAA iyo sharciyada khuseeya
✓ Raacida siyaasadaha iyo hab-maamuusyada hay'addaada
✓ Si sax ah u maarreynta Xogta Caafimaadka ee La Ilaaliyay (PHI)
✓ Isticmaalka amniga qalabka (koodh, Face ID, sir)
✓ Wadaagida xogta kaliya shaqaalaha la oggol yahay
✓ Ilaalinta asturnaanta bukanka

Horumariyuhu MAAHA Shaqaale Ganacsi HIPAA. Ma helno, ma dirno, mana kaydino xogta bukanka. Dhammaan xogtu waxay ku hareysaa qalabKAAGA.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section3Body:
Abkani waa qalab dukumeenti gelin, MAAHA talo caafimaad.

Marwalba raac tababarkaaga, borotokooladaada, iyo hagitaanka caafimaad.

Horumariyuhu MAS'UUL KAMA AHA:
• Go'aannada caafimaadka ee abkan lagu isticmaalay
• Khaladaha ama waxyaabaha laga maqnaaday dukumeenti gelinta
• Go'aannada qiyaasta dawada ama daaweynta
• Natiijooyinka bukanka ama dhacdooyinka xun
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section4Body:
• Dhammaan xogta waxaa lagu kaydiyaa qalabKAAGA kaliya
• ADIGA ayaad mas'uul ka tahay amniga qalabka
• Shid koodhka qalabka/bayoolojiga (Dejinta → Face ID & Koodhka)
• Kaydka qalabka (iCloud/iTunes) waxay ka kooban karaan PHI - si sax ah u ilaali
• Isku-duwaan daruuraha ma jiraan - horumariyuhu ma heli karo xogtaada
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section5Body:
Marka la wadaago diiwaannada wacitaanka AirDrop, iimaylka, ama qaabab kale:

ADIGA mas'uulka ka tahay:
✓ Xaqiijinta qaabiluhu uu oggol yahay inuu helo PHI
✓ Isticmaalka qaababka dirista ee ammaan ah
✓ Raacida heerka ugu yar ee HIPAA
✓ Dukumeenti gelinta bayaannada sida ay hay'addaadu u dalbato

Wareejinta hay'adaha dhexdooda (dab-demis→ambalaaniga) waxay ku jirtaa xogta bukanka. Tani waa DHAQAN CAADI AH EMS oo caafimaad ahaan lagama maarmaan u ah sii wadida daryeelka. MedicLog wuxuu bixiyaa AMNI KA WANAAGSAN wareejinta waraaqaha.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section6Body:
Haddii aad MedicLog ka isticmaasho hay'ad:
✓ Ka hel ogolaanshaha kormeerahaaga/sarkaalka waafaqsanaanta
✓ Raac siyaasadaha hay'adda dukumeenti gelinta
✓ Soo sheeg dhacdooyinka amniga siyaasadahaaga
✓ Faham shuruudaha dukumeenti gelinta EMS gobolkaaga
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section7Body:
INTA UGU BADAN EE SHARCIGA U OGOLAADO, HORUMARIYUHU MAS'UUL KAMA AHA:

• Ku xadgudubka HIPAA ama ganaaxaha sharci
• Luminta, kharribka, ama helitaanka aan la oggolaaday ee xogta
• Khaladaha caafimaad ama waxyeelada bukanka
• Waxyeello kasta oo ka timaada isticmaalka ama isticmaali la'aanta abkan
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section8Body:
Waxaad ogolaatay inaad uga soo horjeeddo oo ka difaacdo horumariyaha dacwad kasta, waxyeello, ama kharashaad ka timaada:

• Isticmaalkaaga abkan
• Ku xadgudubkaaga shuruudahaan
• Ku xadgudubkaaga HIPAA ama sharciyada kale
• Go'aannada caafimaad ama ficilada daryeelka bukanka
